name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Sumter, SC's TitleMax Title Loans at 1021 Broad St Suite B offers fast title loans and cash advances with same-day funding.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans in Sumter, SC is located at 1021 Broad St Suite B, a standalone storefront in central Sumter. Open Monday and Friday 10AM–7PM, Tuesday–Thursday 10AM–6PM, and Saturday 10AM–4PM (closed Sundays), this location provides convenient in-person access for local residents. The office is easy to find and accessible during extended weekday hours.

At this Sumter location, you can apply for title loans, secure cash advances, and discuss loan terms tailored to your financial situation. Call +1 803-774-6000 to inquire about current rates, required documents, or to ask questions about the application process. The staff can walk you through options and timeline expectations.

If you're a Sumter resident facing unexpected bills or short-term expenses, bring your vehicle title and valid ID when you visit. Title loans provide faster funding than traditional lenders and keep you in control of your vehicle. TitleMax serves Sumter and the surrounding SC area with competitive rates and straightforward terms.
address: 1021 Broad St Suite B, Sumter, SC 29150

company_info.headquarters: 1021 Broad St Suite B, Sumter, SC 29150

pros: Same-day cash funding available on approved title loans
Accepts most credit types — credit score is not the sole qualifier
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the loan is active
Bilingual staff available at the Summer Avenue location
Offers both secured (title pledge) and unsecured line of credit options
Flex line of credit allows withdrawals over time rather than a single lump sum
481+ Google reviews with a 5.00/5 average rating at this branch
cons: Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession if the borrower cannot repay
No APR or rate information disclosed on the store page — 'competitive rates' is unverified
Online unsecured credit line is restricted to only 11 states
Sunday hours are unavailable — store is closed on Sundays
Requires a clear vehicle title, excluding borrowers with liens or financing on their car
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or thin credit who need cash the same day
Borrowers who have been denied traditional personal loans or bank financing
Memphis-area residents needing a bilingual lending experience
Consumers who need revolving access to funds rather than a one-time lump sum
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners with poor credit who face an urgent, short-term cash need and have no access to lower-cost alternatives. The main caveat is that title loans are high-cost products with vehicle repossession risk, and no interest rate information is published, making true cost comparison impossible before applying.
services: Title pledge loans secured by vehicle title
Unsecured flexible line of credit (in-store and online)
Credit check with most credit types accepted
Vehicle value assessment for loan qualification
Customer account management portal for existing loans
Flexible withdrawal from credit line up to credit limit
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 1021 Broad St, Sumter, SC. Fast title loans with same-day funding and competitive rates for local residents.
